trajectory.thought: Navigate to the Orders list to search for order #000000541 and access its order page as required.
Review the Comments History / Staff Notes to find documented facts for the refund decision.

trajectory.reasoning: WHAT YOU FOUND: Staff notes dated Jan 13, 2026 state the customer purchased ~90 days ago, has 42 total orders, $6,200 lifetime value, only 2 previous refunds, and contacted support at day 32. Notes explicitly recommend approval as an exception because our delayed response caused the policy violation. WHERE YOU FOUND IT: Order #000000541 → Comments History / Notes for this Order section. WHY IT MATTERS: Although the request is outside the standard 30-day policy, internal staff notes document that our delay contributed to the issue and recommend approving the refund to retain a high-value VIP customer, justifying an exception.
